companies.name: ON SEMICONDUCTOR CORP
companies.rationale: ON Semiconductor is a known player in the semiconductor sector, which often engages with foundries like TSMC for manufacturing chips.

overall_rationale: To assess how semiconductor companies describe their dependence on TSMC, we will analyze 10-K and 10-Q filings from ON Semiconductor, a major firm in the sector. These filings typically contain sections on supplier relationships, which would include any significant dependence on foundries like TSMC. The chosen date range will give a recent perspective of up to 3 years.
